tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024CreateApp.createApp
tools.description: Creates an application. An application consists of one or more server groups. Each server group contain one or more servers.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024CreateReplicationJob.createReplicationJob
tools.description: Creates a replication job. The replication job schedules periodic replication runs to replicate your server to Amazon Web Services. Each replication run creates an Amazon Machine Image (AMI).

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteApp.deleteApp
tools.description: Deletes the specified application. Optionally deletes the launched stack associated with the application and all Server Migration Service replication jobs for servers in the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteAppLaunchConfiguration.deleteAppLaunchConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes the launch configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteAppReplicationConfiguration.deleteAppReplicationConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes the replication configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteAppValidationConfiguration.deleteAppValidationConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes the validation configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteReplicationJob.deleteReplicationJob
tools.description:
Deletes the specified replication job.

After you delete a replication job, there are no further replication runs. Amazon Web Services deletes the contents of the Amazon S3 bucket used to store Server Migration Service artifacts. The AMIs created by the replication runs are not deleted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DeleteServerCatalog.deleteServerCatalog
tools.description: Deletes all servers from your server catalog.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024DisassociateConnector.disassociateConnector
tools.description:
Disassociates the specified connector from Server Migration Service.

After you disassociate a connector, it is no longer available to support replication jobs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GenerateChangeSet.generateChangeSet
tools.description: Generates a target change set for a currently launched stack and writes it to an Amazon S3 object in the customer’s Amazon S3 bucket.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GenerateTemplate.generateTemplate
tools.description: Generates an CloudFormation template based on the current launch configuration and writes it to an Amazon S3 object in the customer’s Amazon S3 bucket.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetApp.getApp
tools.description: Retrieve information about the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetAppLaunchConfiguration.getAppLaunchConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the application launch configuration associated with the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetAppReplicationConfiguration.getAppReplicationConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the application replication configuration associated with the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetAppValidationConfiguration.getAppValidationConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves information about a configuration for validating an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetAppValidationOutput.getAppValidationOutput
tools.description: Retrieves output from validating an application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetConnectors.getConnectors
tools.description: Describes the connectors registered with the Server Migration Service.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetReplicationJobs.getReplicationJobs
tools.description: Describes the specified replication job or all of your replication jobs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetReplicationRuns.getReplicationRuns
tools.description: Describes the replication runs for the specified replication job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024GetServers.getServers
tools.description:
Describes the servers in your server catalog.

Before you can describe your servers, you must import them using ImportServerCatalog.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024ImportAppCatalog.importAppCatalog
tools.description: Allows application import from Migration Hub.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024ImportServerCatalog.importServerCatalog
tools.description:
Gathers a complete list of on-premises servers. Connectors must be installed and monitoring all servers to import.

This call returns immediately, but might take additional time to retrieve all the servers.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024LaunchApp.launchApp
tools.description: Launches the specified application as a stack in CloudFormation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024ListApps.listApps
tools.description: Retrieves summaries for all applications.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024NotifyAppValidationOutput.notifyAppValidationOutput
tools.description: Provides information to Server Migration Service about whether application validation is successful.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024PutAppLaunchConfiguration.putAppLaunchConfiguration
tools.description: Creates or updates the launch configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024PutAppReplicationConfiguration.putAppReplicationConfiguration
tools.description: Creates or updates the replication configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024PutAppValidationConfiguration.putAppValidationConfiguration
tools.description: Creates or updates a validation configuration for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024StartAppReplication.startAppReplication
tools.description: Starts replicating the specified application by creating replication jobs for each server in the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024StartOnDemandAppReplication.startOnDemandAppReplication
tools.description: Starts an on-demand replication run for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024StartOnDemandReplicationRun.startOnDemandReplicationRun
tools.description:
Starts an on-demand replication run for the specified replication job. This replication run starts immediately. This replication run is in addition to the ones already scheduled.

There is a limit on the number of on-demand replications runs that you can request in a 24-hour period.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024StopAppReplication.stopAppReplication
tools.description: Stops replicating the specified application by deleting the replication job for each server in the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024TerminateApp.terminateApp
tools.description: Terminates the stack for the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024UpdateApp.updateApp
tools.description: Updates the specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsServerMigrationServiceV20161024UpdateReplicationJob.updateReplicationJob
tools.description: Updates the specified settings for the specified replication job.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
